title: EurekaCraft 2
description: Vanilla++ with Exploration, Building, Village Improvements, Create, Magic, Origins, and Quality of Life changes as the primary influence.
body:
# EurekaCraft 2
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Version-1.20.1-blue)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Channel-Release-green)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/wa2Na7BS)

Vanilla++ with a focus Exploration, Building, New Structures, Create, Magic, Origins, and Quality of Life changes as the primary influence. 

**Features Include**  
- **Worldgen** - Terralith and Tectonic add new realistic and fantasy biomes. Updated Nether and End by Incendium and Nullscape.

- **Travel** - Fly using Immersive Aircraft, tame and ride creatures from Mythic Mounts, and create trains with Create mod!

- **Bosses** - Fight new bosses from AdventureZ, VoidZ, and an overhauled Ender Dragon fight from End Dragon Fight Remastered with Yung's Better End Island.

- **Exploration** - Explore many new structures including underwater ruins from Philip's Ruins, giant dungeons from When Dungeons Arise, and all vanilla structures have been overhauled with Yung's Better Structures.

- **Quests** - Basic quest book has been added to help introduce you to some of the mods. 

- **Villager Overhaul** - ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages greatly updates village generation and villagers. While Towns and Towers adds additional unique villages and structures. Explore villages underwater, on land, or in the sky!

- **Create** - Create and supplementary mods have been included. Make trains, contraptions, new automations and more! 

- **QOL** - Updated crafting recipes, includes craftable saddles and bells. Compressed blocks and more item stacks. Inventory Sorting, Rightclick Harvesting, Experience Storage, Vein Mining and more.

- **Storage** - Tom’s Simple Storage Mod and Drawers for those fancy large storage options. Expanded Storage to increase storage chest sizes, Metal Bundles to make looting easier, and backpacks from Traveler's Backpacks!

- **Origins** - Choose your Origin and Class! Multiple new Origins, and an updated GUI for easier selection.

- **Loot** - Instanced player loot with Lootr so you never have to worry about a dungeons loot already being taken. Better loot in the new villages and structures too!

- **Building** - Chipped, Cluttered, Adorn, Beautify, and Handcrafted all add many new decoration blocks, furniture, lights, plushies, and more. Also includes 1.21 Copper and Tuff backport!

- **Mobs** - Elite mobs from AdventureZ, new Creeper variants from Creeper Overhaul, additional mob variants, colors, cute passive mobs from Species, Naturalist, and Hybrid Aquatic

- **Magic** - Botania for all of your magic automation, Spectrum lets you discover hidden magic in plain sight, Bewitchment for all of your witchcraft needs, and more magic mods!

- **Performance** - FerriteCore for memory optimizations, Sodium for rendering engine, More Culling to not render things when you can't see them, and so much more.

- **Shader Ready** - Iris is built in to allow shaders if you wish to include them!

**And much more!**

  
### Credits
_Please check out these mods and packs below as they are incredible, and this pack would not exist without their help and inspiration._
- Fabulously Optimized
  - [Link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
